title: TelecomService placeCall() via self-managed ConnectionService with normal-level MANAGE_OWN_CALLS
notes: MANAGE_OWN_CALLS is normal-level (auto-granted). Any app can register a ConnectionService and use addNewIncomingCall()/placeCall() to create phone call UI without CALL_PHONE. Creates convincing fake incoming call screens — phishing vector. Does NOT place real cellular calls, but the UI is very convincing on stock Android dialer.
